core_capabilities: Automated retrieval of structured records from any external data source via configurable API connectors
Configurable scoring and filtering logic that can be owned and modified by the operator without vendor dependency
Repeatable, scheduled execution of multi-step data workflows with near-zero marginal cost per run
Normalization and deduplication of heterogeneous data into a consistent, queryable schema
Flexible output delivery to any downstream system or format

economic_advantages.detail: Replaces a USD ~2,500/month outsourced service with automation that runs at near-zero marginal cost per execution

economic_advantages.advantage: Instant iteration with no vendor lag
economic_advantages.detail: Operators can change targeting criteria, scoring logic, or output format in minutes rather than waiting on vendor turnaround cycles
Logic and data live in the operator's infrastructure, eliminating lock-in and enabling compounding improvement over time
Running the workflow at 10x volume does not require 10x spend — the marginal cost per additional record is near zero once infrastructure is in place

replaced_alternatives: Outsourced data research or lead generation agencies
Manual analyst research and spreadsheet compilation
Subscription data platforms (Apollo, ZoomInfo, etc.) with per-seat or per-record pricing
Internal VA or offshore team executing repeatable data tasks
Point-solution SaaS tools that bundle automation with proprietary data access

generalized_use_cases.use_case: Automated prospect research and list building
generalized_use_cases.target_user: Sales and growth teams at SMBs and mid-market companies
generalized_use_cases.why_it_matters: Replaces expensive monthly subscriptions or agency fees for a repeatable workflow that can run on demand at near-zero marginal cost

generalized_use_cases.target_user: Product and strategy teams tracking market changes
generalized_use_cases.why_it_matters: Automates recurring data pulls from public sources, scored and normalized, replacing analyst hours or vendor reports
Standardizes and automates a historically manual process of sourcing, scoring, and shortlisting vendors against configurable criteria

generalized_use_cases.use_case: Job market or talent sourcing workflow
generalized_use_cases.target_user: Recruiting teams and talent acquisition ops
generalized_use_cases.why_it_matters: Replaces recruiter hours or agency fees for top-of-funnel candidate discovery by automating search, extraction, scoring, and delivery to an ATS

generalized_use_cases.use_case: Real estate or asset opportunity tracking
generalized_use_cases.target_user: Real estate investors, acquisition teams, asset managers
generalized_use_cases.why_it_matters: Runs recurring searches across listing sources, applies scoring criteria, and surfaces ranked opportunities — replacing manual monitoring or expensive broker services
Automates extraction and normalization of records from public or semi-public sources, scored against compliance thresholds, replacing manual review cycles
